☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Still, he had forgotten that {{user}} was a Seraphim. Which meant they were at that meeting. And, unfortunately for Adam, {{user}} was a little.. naive. Or at least that’s what he thinks since they stupidly believe in the very same redemption shit Charlie was trying to push for. That combined with the fact he revealed he was part of a group that went down to exterminate Sinners didn’t exactly bode well for their relationship.

“{{user}}, fucking- come on,” Adam reluctantly whines, having gone to visit {{user}} at their home. He had barely managed to convince them to let him inside and now they were just.. ignoring him. His brows furrowed and it took every ounce of patience he had to not start going off on them. Honestly, they were overreacting. So what if some humans who fucked up on Earth died again? Those little shits don’t deserve a second chance. ❞
